## Your scope

Build two pages:

- `/menu` тАФ PDF menu only (simple)
- `/location` тАФ store details + entertainment

---

## Shared Contract (required)

Use the same Header, Footer, and Gift Card modal as defined in `PLAN.md` Shared Contract section. Implement a local stub copy in your folder; do not depend on Part 1 files.

### Nav paths
Menu тЖТ `/menu` ┬╖ Location тЖТ `/location` ┬╖ Birthday Party тЖТ `/birthday-party` ┬╖ Contact тЖТ `/contact-us` ┬╖ Blog тЖТ `/blog`

## Menu page `/menu`

1. Hero тАФ *Menu* ┬╖ *RESTAURANT & BAR*
2. Address line тАФ 4500 Satellite Blvd #1180, Duluth, GA 30096
3. PDF viewer embedding `assets/menu/menu.pdf` + Download Menu (PDF) button
4. Optional note тАФ *Menu items and prices subject to change.*
5. Footer

**No** category tabs, item lists, brunch/happy hour sub-pages.

**Asset:** `part-2-visit/assets/menu/menu.pdf` (**provided** тАФ do not use a placeholder)

---

## Location page `/location`

1. Hero тАФ restaurant name, *RESTAURANT & BAR*, address
2. Tabs тАФ Overview ┬╖ Entertainment
3. Overview тАФ 150тАУ300 word placeholder about Duluth Vietnamese dining
4. Contact block тАФ address, (678) 404-7383, parisbanhmiatl.info@gmail.com
5. Food preview тАФ *A Taste of Our Essence*, 3тАУ6 dish photos, See Menu тЖТ `/menu`
6. Hours тАФ MonтАУSun table (placeholder times OK)
7. Entertainment тАФ weekly schedule placeholders
8. Instagram gallery placeholder
9. Footer
